plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-198 RP06.P00.M00.S01-RP06.P01.M02.S08 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-198 establishes descriptor-only RP06 DMS Core foundation models, synthetic fixtures, contract projection, validator, tests, and package wiring without object-storage, OCR, search, email, Citation Ledger, Loop, permission runtime, audit runtime, or real document data execution.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-198 dms core foundation model registry pack
